description: QE 7.5 ph.x epsil/zeu references (E-field DFPT at Gamma)

si.note: 4x4x4-mesh values (NOT k-converged; both codes agree on the raw physics). born_raw = before QE's post-hoc ASR enforcement; symmetry makes the ASR-corrected Z* exactly 0. QE needed nr=32 (30 is incompatible with the 1/4,1/4,1/4 fractional translation); gradwave ran its natural 30^3 grid - eps agrees to 4e-4 regardless.

mgo.note: gradwave: eps 3.449147 (0.31%), Z*Mg 1.98649 (0.07%), Z*O -2.07738 (0.10%), ASR sum -0.09089. dk-independent to 6 decimals (2e-3..5e-4), so the residual is a genuine cross-code difference, within the sub-1% range mature DFPT codes show for eps_inf.
